hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q 'resources.json'; then uv run python scripts/validate_urls.py --force; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '^(cards/|edges\.json$)'; then uv run python scripts/update_readme_stats.py && git add README.md; fi
